params.name: 1900's Vinyl Record
params.description:
On Oct 29, 1921 AD, an unknown pianist recorded his feelings for a girl in this record.
This vinyl record is the only recorded work of an unknown pianist born and living on a ship. After defeating a famous pianist in a piano duel, he was invited by a company to make a recording. But because this piece of music was composed when he fell in love with a girl, he changed his mind and planned to dedicate this record to her. It's a pity that being shy by nature, he failed to gift this record to her …
